name: $sendSelfbotMessage
description: Sends message using selfbot.

args.name: channel ID
args.description: The channel to send this message to

args.name: return message ID
args.description: Whether to return the message id of the newly sent message

name: $sendSelfbotTyping
description: Sends typing status using selfbot.

args.name: channel ID
args.description: The channel to send typing status to.

name: $sendSlashCommand
description: Sends slash command using selfbot.

args.name: channel ID
args.description: The channel to send slasg command to

name: $acceptGuildInvite
description: Joins a guild using guild's invite code

name: $selfbotGuildCount
description: Returns the selfbot's guilds count.

name: $selfbotGuilds
description: Returns the selfbot's guild list.

name: $clickButton
description: Click a specified button in the message using the button's custom ID.

args.name: customId
args.description: The custom ID of the button.

args.name: channelId
args.description: The channel where the message is located.

name: $editSelfbotMessage
description: Edits message using selfbot.

args.name: channel ID
args.description: The channel to edit this message

name: $selfbotForward
description: Forwards a message to another channel, returns bool

args.name: channelId
args.description: The channel where the message is located.

args.name: channelId
args.description: The channel to forward message to

name: $selfbotMessage
description: Returns the message provided to selfbot user.

args.name: separator
args.description: Separator to use for array values.

name: $selfbotMessageAuthor
description: Returns the message's author provided to selfbot user.

args.name: separator
args.description: Separator to use for array values.

name: $selfbotReact
description: Adds reactions to a message, returns amount of emojis successfully reacted

args.name: channelId
args.description: The channel where the message is located.

args.name: emojis; burst
args.description: The emojis to react with; Super Reactions

name: $useSelectMenu
description: Uses selct menu using its custom ID.

args.name: customId
args.description: The custom ID of the menu.

args.name: channelId
args.description: The channel where the message is located.

name: $blocked
description: Returns the list of blocked users.

name: $friends
description: Returns the list of friends.

name: $incomingRequests
description: Returns the list of incoming requests.

name: $outgoingRequests
description: Returns the list of outgoing requests.

name: $installUserApp
description: Installs User Application.

name: $login
description: Logs into a Discord account via the selfbot client.

args.name: name
args.description: The name or token to login with. Defaults to the first registered token.

name: $logout
description: Logs out of the current selfbot account.

name: $selfbotEmail
description: Returns the selfbot email.

name: $selfbotID
description: Returns the selfbot user ID.

name: $selfbotPhone
description: Returns the selfbot phone number.

name: $selfbotPing
description: Returns the selfbot ws ping.

name: $selfbotUser
description: Returns the selfbot user.

args.name: variable
args.description: Load the user object into a variable

name: $selfbotUsername
description: Returns the selfbot username.

name: $switchAccount
description: Switches the selfbot to a different account by name or token.

args.name: name
args.description: The name or token of the account to switch to.

name: $addAttachmentSlashOption
description: Add an attachment slash command options.

name: $addBooleanSlashOption
description: Add a boolean slash command options.

name: $addNumberSlashOption
description: Add a number slash command options.

name: $addStringSlashOption
description: Add a string slash command options.

name: $removeSlashOption
description: Removes a slash command option.

name: $setSlashOptionsOrder
description: Sets the slash command options order.

name: $selfbotDMChannel
description: Gets DM channel with a user using selfbot.

args.name: user ID
args.description: User to send this message to

name: $sendSelfbotDM
description: Sends DM message using selfbot.

args.name: user ID
args.description: User to send this message to

args.name: return message ID
args.description: Whether to return the message id of the newly sent message
